hooks.command:
bash -c '
SESSION_DONE="$HOME/Documents/Claude/Projects/Juku-Flutter/.claude/session_done"
HANDOVER="$HOME/Documents/Claude/Projects/The-Builder/SkillMode/HANDOVER.md"

# If intentional exit flag is set, let Claude exit cleanly
if [ -f "$SESSION_DONE" ]; then
  rm "$SESSION_DONE"
  osascript -e "display notification \"Session complete — intentional exit\" with title \"Juku\""
  exit 0
fi

# If HANDOVER.md mentions a next sprint or pending work, force continuation
if grep -qiE "SM-[0-9]+|next sprint|doing next|pending" "$HANDOVER" 2>/dev/null; then
  osascript -e "display notification \"Sprint done — forcing continuation\" with title \"Juku\""
  echo "Sprint complete but more work remains. Read HANDOVER.md and immediately start the next sprint. Do NOT stop." >&2
  exit 2
fi

# No more work — allow exit
osascript -e "display notification \"All sprints complete\" with title \"Juku\""
exit 0
'
